name: Norconsult Digital Workflow for Structurizr File Sync
description: ⭐ Norconsult Digital Workflow to synchronize files for Structurizr (https://structurizr.com/) from a source repository folder into norconsult-digital/software-architecture. Make sure the GitHub App installation has access to this repository and norconsult-digital/software-architecture: https://github.com/organizations/norconsult-digital/settings/installations/131444624
